_meta.note: Live data fetched from VIT official website. Run `npm run scrape` to refresh.

college.name: Vishwakarma Institute of Technology
college.status: First private, self-financed autonomous engineering college in Maharashtra (2008)
college.vision: To be a globally acclaimed Institute in Technical Education and Research for holistic socio-economic development.
college.mission: To ensure that 100% of students are employable and employed in industry, higher studies, entrepreneurship, civil or defence services, government jobs, and other areas.

computer engineering.eligibility: 12th PCM with min 50% (45% for reserved category)
computer engineering.about: One of VIT's flagship departments. Strong industry connections, active coding clubs, and excellent placement record.

computer engineering (software engineeri.about: Specialized branch focused on software development lifecycle, agile methods, and industry-ready engineering practices.

computer science and engineering (ai).about: Cutting-edge program integrating core CS with advanced AI specializations.

computer science and engineering (ai & m.full_name: B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering (AI & ML)
computer science and engineering (ai & m.about: Program combining CS fundamentals with AI and Machine Learning specialization.

computer science and engineering (data s.full_name: B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science)
computer science and engineering (data s.about: Focused on data analysis, statistical computing, and modern data engineering pipelines.

computer science and engineering (iot an.full_name: B.Tech CSE (IoT and Cyber Security Including Blockchain Technology)
computer science and engineering (iot an.about: Specialized in connected systems, security, and blockchain technologies — one of the most in-demand branches.

artificial intelligence and data science.about: Interdisciplinary program at the intersection of artificial intelligence and data engineering.

information technology.about: Strong focus on practical IT skills with industry-driven curriculum.

electronics and telecommunication.about: One of VIT's oldest departments with strong research output and industry ties.

mechanical engineering.about: Comprehensive mechanical engineering program with strong lab infrastructure and core industry placements.

civil engineering.about: Strong infrastructure and practitioner faculty from industry.

chemical engineering.about: One of the few colleges in Pune offering a dedicated Chemical Engineering program.

instrumentation engineering.about: Niche program with excellent industry demand in automation and process control sectors.

fees.note: Fees are per academic year. Subject to revision by SPPU/State Government. Always verify at https://www.vit.edu
fees.hostel_boys: Available on campus — contact admission office
fees.hostel_girls: Available on campus — contact admission office
fees.scholarships: Government of Maharashtra scholarships available for SC/ST/OBC/EBC/SBC categories

admissions.process: Through MHT-CET / JEE Main scores via Maharashtra CAP (Centralized Admission Process)
admissions.il_admission: Institute Level (IL) seats available — apply directly to VIT

eligibility.age: Should have completed 17 years of age on or before 31st December of admission year

tpo.name: Prof. Karthick Subramanian Balasubramanian
tpo.designation: Head, Central Training and Placement Office, Vishwakarma Institutes

infrastructure.campus: Bibwewadi, Pune — urban campus with modern facilities
infrastructure.library: Central Library with digital and physical resources
infrastructure.labs: Well-equipped labs for all departments with industry-standard tools
infrastructure.sports: Cricket, Football, Basketball, Badminton, Table Tennis, Gymnasium
infrastructure.canteen: College canteen with varied food options
infrastructure.transport: Well connected via PMPML buses; near Bibwewadi junction

examinations.pattern: VIT Pune is autonomous — conducts its own examinations
examinations.note: Check https://www.vit.edu/examinations/ for latest exam timetables and notifications

research.details: Active research across all departments. Faculty and students engage in funded projects.

rankings.details: Ranked among premier technical institutes in western India. Check official rankings page for current data.

contact.address: 666, Upper Indiranagar, Bibwewadi, Pune – 411037, Maharashtra, India
